title: 11 Soothing Herbal Creams for Nursing Mothers with Fever Blister on Lip
description: Aloe barbadensis creams have been used for centuries to help soothe and heal fever blisters on the lip. The gel extracted from the aloe vera plant contains several properties and constituents that make it effective in treating lip blisters. It has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, thanks to the presence of aloin, aloe-emodin, and vitamins A, C, and E. These properties help reduce swelling, ease pain, and prevent infection.
